title: Tempus AI — deep-dive
question: It's my favorite company; does the thesis survive a hard look?
finding: Conditional. A differentiated, finally-inflecting business (FY2025 revenue +83% to $1.27bn, ~33% organic; adjusted EBITDA crossing zero, Q4 positive; guided ~+$65m for 2026) with a real-but-narrow data moat (126% net revenue retention, >$1.1bn contracted backlog). But still GAAP-unprofitable, ~6x forward sales, with related-party earnings-quality flags and 30-vote founder control. A high-quality business to own with eyes open, not a clean buy. Builds on study 03.
author: Hsin Cheng Yeh
